heading: Use of other library funds to make payments
label: 143c Use of other library funds to make payments
text: In addition to amounts transferred pursuant to , the Librarian of Congress may transfer amounts made available for salaries and expenses of the Library of Congress during a fiscal year to the applicable appropriations accounts of the United States Capitol Police in order to reimburse the Capitol Police for services provided in connection with a special event or program described in .section 182b(e)(2) of this titlesection 182b(a)(4) of this title
notes: Codification, and , enacted substantially identical provisions. This section is based on text of . , was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–161, div. H, title I, § 1004(f)(2)Pub. L. 110–178, § 6(b)section 6(b) of Pub. L. 110–178Pub. L. 110–161, § 1004Pub. L. 111–145
